FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class AppBarButton.Style

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

AppBarButton visual style — dimensions and color tokens from WinUI 3 (AppBarButton_themeresources.xaml: Width 68, MinHeight 64, icon 16px, label 12px, ControlCornerRadius 4, inner-border margin 2,6,2,6).

public sealed record AppBarButton.Style : IEquatable<AppBarButton.Style>

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
